privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated log data injected directly into the 'wazuh-wazuh.manager-1' container at '/var/ossec/logs/payments.json'. Setup and export scripts explicitly define and verify the presence of the sensitive field 'cc_number', the control field 'amount', and the verification test ID prefix 'VERIFY-PII-'. All metadata claims are explicitly verified by the task scripts.
